name: Blood on the Altar
intro_text: You have arrived in Dunwich — a forsaken village in the hills, its people diminished and its buildings rotting. The locals regard you with suspicion, and with good reason.
Children have gone missing. The elders speak in hushed tones about the Dunwich Horror. And somewhere beneath the village, something old is stirring — and hungry.
setup_instructions: Set aside Silas Bishop (02225). He is encountered during the scenario.
Investigators begin at the Village Commons.
Randomly select which locations are used this scenario (6 of the named locations), per the scenario rules.
Place clues on each selected location.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The ritual is disrupted
text: You find the hidden chamber beneath the Congregational Church and disrupt the ritual before Silas Bishop can complete his sacrifice.
The village breathes easier — but you know this is not the end. The cult will not stop.
Record in the campaign log: *The ritual was disrupted.* Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP.

R2.label: Resolution 2 — Too late
text: By the time you find the hidden chamber, the ritual is complete. Silas Bishop has fed the beast.
Record in the campaign log: *The ritual was completed.* Each investigator suffers 1 mental trauma.

defeat.label: Defeat — Driven from Dunwich
text: The horrors of Dunwich drive you from the village. You flee into the hills as something vast and invisible shakes the ground behind you.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at Dunwich.*
